title: arrhenatherum elatius f. biflorum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatium f. biflorum, also known as tall meadow grass or sweet hay grass, is a rare flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Arrhenatherum elatium f. biflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve muscle spasms, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of this plant include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate anxiety. Herbal preparations of Arrhenatherum elatium f. biflorum include tinctures and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, but its efficacy and safety as a treatment have not been extensively scientifically studied.
